BOTH PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES TO DEPARTMENT 501 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MAY 19, 2025. NOTE, FUTURE LAW & MOTION MATTERS SHOULD BE DIRECTED TO THAT DEPARTMENT AS WELL. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)
